stemHtml: Just after a flight, an aircraft is parked outside on the apron, where it is being refuelled. Freezing drizzle starts to fall. On which surfaces will ice accretion take the longest time?

options.a: Just above the fuel tanks and engines.
options.b: Areas above the spars and the main landing gear doubler plate.
options.c: The wing root area between the front and rear spars.
